title: donella pentagonocarpa
intro: Donella pentagonocarpa, also known as Dillenia pentagyna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dilleniaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, bark, and roots, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Donella pentagonocarpa include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, wounds, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
